---
title: Contribution to Community Software
page-layout: full
---

We are committed to developing and supporting open community software, with our group contributing to FHI-aims, Metalwalls, and i-PI, where Yair is one of the core developers.

* **<a href="https://ipi-code.org/">i-PI: a universal force engine</a>**
* **<a href="https://fhi-aims.org/">FHI-aims: The ab initio materials simulation package</a>**
* **<a href="https://gitlab.com/ampere2/metalwalls">MetalWalls: a molecular dynamics code for electrochemical systems</a>**
